chapter_title: Transfer of Title or Interest in Undocumented Vessel
text: A legal owner may assign his title or interest in or to an undocumented vessel numbered under this code to a person other than the owner without the consent of and without affecting the interest of the owner.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3.5. REGISTRATION AND TRANSFER OF VESSELS [9840 - 9928]
### Chapter 3. Transfer of Title or Interest in Undocumented Vessel [9900 - 9928]
##### § 9906

A legal owner may assign his title or interest in or to an undocumented vessel numbered under this code to a person other than the owner without the consent of and without affecting the interest of the owner.

*(Added by Stats. 1970, Ch. 1428.)*

subsections.text: A legal owner may assign his title or interest in or to an undocumented vessel numbered under this code to a person other than the owner without the consent of and without affecting the interest of the owner.
